title: Devyani International Holdings Services is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Devyani International Holdings Services is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Devyani International Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Devyani International Holdings Services:
Devyani International Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Devyani International Holdings Services!
